headline: Progressive Analysts Slash Their Forecasts After Q2 Results
summary: A mixed Q2 for Progressive Corp. (NYSE:PGR) as revenue beat expectations but net income and earnings per share declined. Analysts lowered price targets.

raw.headline: Progressive Analysts Slash Their Forecasts After Q2 Results

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on Progressive, Lowers Price Target to $205
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Michael Zaremski   maintains Progressive (NYSE:PGR) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $220 to $205.
